notes: The three named ingredients are all directly used and present: structure M=<D,I>, open formula phi (def:predicate), and the satisfaction relation in the set-builder. The modified assignment s[x_i -> a_i] (def:mod-assign) is the evaluation mechanism but is part of the satisfaction apparatus (def:fol-satisfaction already carries def:mod-assign), so it is transitive rather than a missing direct edge.
